description_long: This is a two-story rectangular house with a dark exterior and a red-tiled gable roof. The front facade features four symmetrically placed windows with white frames and a central white door. On one side, there is a driveway with a red car parked next to the house, and a covered patio area extends from the rear. The property includes a large green lawn and a rectangular swimming pool with a ladder at the back. The windows are evenly distributed, and the overall design is simple and modern, with minimal decorative elements. The house sits on a flat plot, with clear separation between the driveway, lawn, and pool area.
description: A modern two-story house with a dark facade, red-tiled gable roof, symmetrical windows, a driveway, and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark facade, four white-framed windows, central door, and driveway with a red car.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, red car, covered patio, and the swimming pool in the backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, large green lawn, and the rectangular swimming pool with a ladder.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, patio roof, and the side wall of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central white door with no steps or porch, minimalistic and unadorned
